name: jobstash-mcp
description: Community MCP server wrapping JobStash.xyz public crypto/web3 jobs API. Six tools, two resources, two prompts.

bearer.description: If set on the deployment, clients must send Authorization: Bearer <value>

oneClickInstall.claudeCodeStdio: claude mcp add jobstash -- npx -y jobstash-mcp

v0.settingsPath: Settings → MCP Connections → Add MCP → Custom server

v0Api.snippet:
const server = await v0.integrations.mcp.servers.create({ name: 'jobstash', url: '<DEPLOYMENT_URL>/api/mcp' });
await v0.chats.create({ message: '...', mcpServerIds: [server.id] });

chatgpt.requires: ChatGPT Pro/Plus with Developer mode enabled

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.summary: Paginated, filterable crypto/web3 job search. ~30 filter params: tags, chains, seniority, salary range, TVL, audits, hacks, publicationDate window, etc.

tools.name: get_filter_catalog
tools.summary: Discover canonical filter values (tags, chains, locations, classifications, commitments, seniority). Call once per session before search_jobs.

tools.name: get_recent_jobs
tools.summary: Time-windowed shortcut: today / this-week / this-month / past-2-weeks / past-3-months / past-6-months.

tools.name: get_organization
tools.summary: Fetch a JobStash organization profile by normalizedName: headcount, funding, investors, ratings, socials, plus active job count.

tools.name: compare_organizations
tools.summary: Side-by-side comparison of 2-5 orgs. Returns headcount, totalRaised, lastFundingRoundName, investorCount, aggregateRating, reviewCount, activeJobCount per org.

tools.name: find_jobs_by_stack
tools.summary: Quick stack-keyword search ('find me Solidity jobs', 'Rust + Substrate').

prompts.name: find_my_next_crypto_job
prompts.summary: Multi-step search wizard. Args: stack, seniority, locationPreference, salaryFloorUsd.

prompts.name: evaluate_organization
prompts.summary: Org due-diligence wizard. Args: normalizedName. Returns red/green flags + score 1-10.

demoPrompts: Find me senior Solidity jobs at audited DeFi protocols with TVL > $100M, sorted by salary descending.
Show jobs posted this week paying in tokens, remote-friendly, on Ethereum or Solana.
Compare these 3 orgs side-by-side: uniswap, lido, aave.
Evaluate the organization 'sardine' as a potential employer.
Find Rust + Substrate jobs at L1s with at least one funding round.

MCP_BEARER_TOKEN.purpose: Set to gate the deployed HTTP endpoint
